name: Digital Twin ROI Scoper
description: Constraint-aware digital twin scoping agent. Given an industry, use case, and resource constraints, queries four LPI tools (smile_overview, get_insights, get_case_studies, query_knowledge) and synthesizes a structured ROI scope report. Every recommendation cites its source tool. Runs fully locally via Ollama — no cloud API required.

supportedInterfaces.comment: Local subprocess. Requires Node.js (npm run build from lpi-developer-kit root) and Ollama on localhost:11434.

skills.name: ROI Scope Generator
skills.description: Accepts industry (string), usecase (string), and constraints (string). Calls smile_overview for methodology baseline, get_insights for scenario-specific advice, get_case_studies for real-world evidence, and query_knowledge for technical depth. Returns a structured 6-section report with full decision trace and source provenance.
examples: I work in healthcare, patient flow optimization, 2 developers and 3 months, no cloud
Manufacturing, predictive maintenance, small team and limited budget
Smart buildings, energy optimization, no cloud, 1 engineer, 6 weeks

_lpiMetadata.explainability: Every recommendation cites the source tool and the specific data that informed it. A Decision Trace section maps each call to the constraint it addresses. Provenance printed separately to stdout after the report.
